name: Rohit Ferro-Tech Limited
summary: Rohit Ferro-Tech Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells ferro alloys in India and internationally. The company operates through two segments, Ferro Alloys and Minerals, and Iron and Steel. It offers high carbon ferro manganese, ferro chrome, ferro chrome chips, and ferro chrome fines; silico manganese; and ferro silicon for use in the production of steel. The company also produces stainless steel products, such as cast billets and ingots, rounds/bars, squares and hexagonal bars, and wire rods. Rohit Ferro-Tech Limited was incorporated in 2000 and is based in Kolkata, India.
